meanings.definition: put into a certain place or abstract location
examples: Set the dogs on the scent of the missing children
Place emphasis on a certain point
lay the books on the table
lay the patient carefully onto the bed

meanings.definition: prepare or position for action or operation
examples: lay the foundation for a new health care plan

meanings.definition: impose as a duty, burden, or punishment
set down according to a plan:
examples: a carefully laid table with places set for four people
